name: Owner User Building Outreach
description: Outreach for a building for sale opportunity in a specific submarket
subject: Potential Building Opportunity in {market}
body:
Hi {first_name},

I am a corporate real estate advisor and specialize in the Calgary office market.

Wanted to know if you would be interested in looking at a building for sale in the {market} market.

• {square_feet} square feet
• {storeys} storeys
• Quick access to major routes
• {exterior_offices} exterior offices, {interior_offices} interior offices, {parking} parking

Let us know if you have any interest and we'll be happy to send more info.

Thank you,
